variants: Rahela Sehic is a notable contributor to environmental technology, having authored the Verdant Array Module, which emphasizes sustainability. Beyond her professional achievements, Rahela is a dedicated member of the Malachite Glassblowers Circle, sharing her passion for the art of glassblowing with fellow artists.

Rahela also engages in her creative pursuits by participating in the Malachite Glassblowers Circle, where she hones her glassblowing skills.
